'''Arnie''' was the [[R9-series astromech droid|R9 droid]] that flew in [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[StealthX]] during the attack on the [[Gorog]] nest, due to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2's]] malfunctioning.

{{Droid-stub}}
